title: New Create
description: ✨Enhances ✨the create mod, with new recipes, challenges and items using kubejs with the objective of making everything renewable!
body: ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hQ4wpSf2/images/e1fb97c7a5ecb485de57558e1eea3c6485084a57.png) ## New Challenges! Did you really think that automating would be easy? It's puzzling to automate zinc actually, literally! And growing with every update! If you have automated everything there are also optional stuff that won't make you gain anything (upcoming in a later update). ## Builder's Friend Everyone likes building, that is why this modpack included mods like twigs, rechisiseld, item labels and framed blocks are some examples; letting you create aesthetically pleasing factories! ## Different Utilities - Tired of starting another modpack cycle, the starter bag has all of the essentials for you to start quickly! - You can not duplicate small flowers until now! ### What are you waiting for, get downloading and experience the new create update! This modpack will update as other mods get ported (steam and rails, garnished, tfmg, gearbox, etc) ![a lot of items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hQ4wpSf2/images/52f706b9155156f4d1b2f976ab53635310f9896b.png) # Other Prejects!
